title: Brussels, Brussels-Capital Region — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

content:
Overview

Brussels is a city in Brussels-Capital Region with a population of 1,235,192. The bilingual capital of Europe, home to the EU institutions, stunning Art Nouveau architecture, world-class museums, and a vibrant multicultural atmosphere.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
